concept: A high-end, cyberpunk-inspired, tech-savvy AI automation marketing site. Relies heavily on deep contrasts, neon accents, 3D particles, and ultra-smooth momentum scrolling.

headings.usage: Hero titles, section headers, massive typography moments.

body.usage: Paragraphs, cards, descriptions. Minimize text content, keep it precise.

labels_mono.usage: Overlines, metrics, stats, small UI text.

glassmorphism.css: background: var(--bg-glass); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
glassmorphism.usage: Fixed Navbar, Booking Modal, Testimonial Cards.

gradients.radial_glow: Use massive blurred radial gradients (e.g., width: 600px, height: 600px, background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--accent-violet) 0%, transparent 70%); filter: blur(100px); opacity: 0.15;) positioned absolutely in the background of sections for depth.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: For high-conversion cards (Solutions/Pricing), use CSS conic-gradient rotating via keyframes as a border to create an 'alive' laser tracing effect.
visual_enhancers.particles: Implement a futuristic node/network connection particle background using tsParticles (vanilla js).
visual_enhancers.tilt_effect: Apply vanilla-tilt.js on solution and why-us cards for premium 3D interaction on hover without heavy WebGL.

animations.name: GSAP + ScrollTrigger
animations.usage: Staggered text reveals, parallax backgrounds, fading in sections as user scrolls.

scrolling.name: Lenis
scrolling.usage: MANDATORY. Add smooth momentum scrolling to the entire window for a premium feel.

particles.name: tsParticles
particles.usage: Full viewport canvas in the Hero and CTA sections with subtle connecting dots/lines (preset: 'links' or 'triangles').

interactions.name: Vanilla-Tilt
interactions.usage: Add data-tilt attributes to grid cards for 3D depth on mouse hover.

layouts.spacing_system: Use generous CSS padding. Sections should have at least padding: 8rem 2rem (128px 32px) for breathing room.

grids.solutions_bento: Use CSS Grid (grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr)). Make cards span asymmetrically (e.g., card 1 spans 8 cols, card 2 spans 4 cols).
grids.why_us: Staggered layout. Left aligned text block, right aligned overlapping images or stats cards.

layouts.hero: min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center (exception to the rule for massive impact); with particle canvas behind it.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue and green glowing neon lines, excellent for section transitions.
Dark futuristic server room with network racks.
Professional smiling man against dark background for testimonial avatar.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over dark backgrounds. Never use pure black #000; use #030305.
accessibility.focus: Add a crisp 2px solid var(--accent-cyan) outline on focus states for interactive elements.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: CRITICAL: The tech stack is ONLY Vanilla JS, Vite, and CSS. NO REACT, NO TAILWIND.
DO NOT use React components, JSX, Shadcn, or Tailwind utility classes (like p-4, flex, etc.). Write standard CSS in .css files using CSS Variables.
DO NOT apply 'transition: all' globally. Target specific properties.
DO NOT center align entire app containers. Use explicit grid/flexbox layouts.
Embed Google Fonts directly in HTML <head> or via CSS @import.
For interactive and informational elements, strictly add a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-btn').
Keep text minimal, punchy, and precise. Avoid massive walls of text.
Ensure the layout has a premium, 'Godly' aesthetic: lots of negative space, sharp typography, glass panels, and subtle glowing elements.
Create immersive depth: use z-index wisely. Background particles -> Glowing Orbs -> Content -> Glass UI components -> Fixed Nav.
All scripts should be loaded via CDNs in the HTML file, and custom JS logic should be separated cleanly, instantiating Lenis, GSAP, and tsParticles on DOMContentLoaded.
